recommendations.title: A Man and a Woman
recommendations.overview: A man and a woman meet by accident on a Sunday evening at their childrens' boarding school. Slowly, they reveal themselves to each other, finding that they have something deeply in common.

recommendations.title: Money Money Money
recommendations.overview: When they realize the times are changing, five crooks decide to switch from bank robberies to personality abductions.

recommendations.title: Un + une
recommendations.overview: A successful film composer falls in love when he travels to India to work on a Bollywood retelling of Romeo and Juliet.

recommendations.title: The Greatest Showman
recommendations.overview: The story of American showman P.T. Barnum, founder of the circus that became the famous traveling Ringling Bros. and Barnum & Bailey Circus.

recommendations.title: September 11
recommendations.overview: An anthology of short films inspired by the events of the September 11 World Trade Center attacks.
recommendations.director: Ken Loach, Shōhei Imamura, Samira Makhmalbaf, Idrissa Ouedraogo, Alejandro González Iñárritu, Claude Lelouch, Amos Gitai, Sean Penn, Danis Tanović, Youssef Chahine, Mira Nair

recommendations.title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
recommendations.overview: An aging Chinese immigrant is swept up in an insane adventure, where she alone can save what's important to her by connecting with the lives she could have led in other universes.

recommendations.title: Mia and the White Lion
recommendations.overview: A young girl from London moves to Africa with her parents where she befriends a lion cub.

recommendations.title: Like Father, Like Son
recommendations.overview: Ryota Nonomiya is a successful businessman driven by money. He learns that his biological son was switched with another child after birth. He must make a life-changing decision and choose his true son or the boy he raised as his own.

recommendations.title: The Circus
recommendations.overview: Charlie, a wandering tramp, becomes a circus handyman - soon the star of the show - and falls in love with the circus owner's stepdaughter.

recommendations.title: D.C. Cab
recommendations.overview: The tale of a hapless group of cabbies and a rundown cab company owned by Harold. Albert comes to town with a dream of starting his own cab company but needs to motivate Harold's employees to want to make something out of themselves. It is only when
